config.js.description: Shared configuration — suppliers, events, Firebase, budget categories

hub.html.description: Unified shell — navigation, shared auth, module loader

venue-planner.html.description: Site layout canvas — drag/drop, Firestore save, quote summary

todo.html.description: Master to-do list — swimlane lifecycle, Firebase sync

kanban.html.description: Kanban + Gantt timeline + Build Week grid

task-tracker.html.description: Simple task tracker (legacy — superseded by todo.html)

notes:
v7-stable checkpoint — full planning session complete.
Fixed: suppliers.html truncation restored.
Fixed: venue picker bug.
Fixed: build week drag & drop and colour coding.
Added: people sorted A-Z.
Added: collapse all / expand all in To-Do.
Added: Design & Print renamed.

Architecture agreed this session:
- Financials module: two views (Rosie headline, Louise detail)
- Baseline locked, tracking editable, variance always shown
- Contingency mandatory
- Bar revenue: simple £/head per event (configurable) or advanced stock model
- Ticket sales as single source of truth driving all resource calculations
- Supplier export to Xero: contact name, email, phone, payment terms (no financial data)
- Payment terms per supplier: deposit %, final %, triggers (days before event or date)
- Smart bar planning tool (width/shape/stations/staff/revenue/RAG)
- Smart toilet planning tool (capacity/pump-out/RAG)
- Design & Print: batch-based quoting, group + supplier tag per item, full CRUD
- Staff: roles first, people assigned with % split, utilisation & gap RAG
- Nothing hardcoded — all values from config/Firestore
- Full CRUD on every list in the app
- Purple Guide: needs commercial licence from Event Safety Alliance
- Shindig to be first event run through full system
